title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked Live: All the News on Z Fold 8, Flip 8, Galaxy Watch
summary: If your Samsung foldable is due for an upgrade, the company is expected to unveil its latest Z Fold and Z Flip smartphones today alongside a refreshed wearable lineup. I later covered Wall Street trading tech before switching gears to consumer tech.
